articles.title: USDC Introduced on Ethereum’s Layer 2 Scaling Solution Arbitrum
articles.description: Circle brought its native USDC on Arbitrum, Ethereums leading layer 2 scaling solution, making Arbitrum the ninth blockchain to extend support for USDC, according to Circles official announcement.The newly enabled function allows businesses utilizing Circle to conveniently swap USDC across supported chains, avoiding the costs and time lags typically linked with bridging...

articles.title: XRP and Solana Outpace Bitcoin, Ethereum: Market Signals Point To Bullish Breakout
articles.description: The digital asset market has regained lost ground recovering from four-week lows with slight gains recorded in Bitcoin (BTC) amid thriving altcoins.

articles.title: The Sandbox (SAND) Owner Animoca Brands to Focus on Non-US Customers
articles.description: Amid increasing regulatory risks, Animoca Brands' Yat Siu announces expansion to less 'hostile' jurisdictions

articles.title: Less Than 100 XRP Needed To Become A Millionaire? New Research Suggests
articles.description: Valhil Capital has published a new research paper assessing the fair value of XRP, and the results are astronomical. The private equity firm explains in the research paper, using six pricing models, that the fair value is somewhere between $3,500 and $21,900 per token. So, as one community member pointed out, it would only take 77.9 XRP to become a millionaire at the median price of $12,822....
